news.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135
news.description: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever . Elon Musk's space and AI conglomerate officially confirmed that it has raised $75 billion from the sale of its shares to its underwriters . At this price, the deal looks set to make Musk the world's first trillionaire . The company, officially known as Space Exploration Technologies Corp., will trade under the SPCX ticker symbol on the Nasdaq stock exchange Friday .

news.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings
news.description: SpaceX SPV investors won't know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift . Some backers in lower-tier vehicles might find they own fewer shares than they think or, in rare cases, that they may not receive any shares at all . SpaceX will be the first major test of the legitimacy of multi-layer SPV structures . The structural ownership of these structures has become so convoluted that even the best-intentioned SPV sponsors may end up misleading their investors .

news.title: Is It a Super El Niño Year? It
news.description: The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration declared that the semiannual climate phenomenon has officially begun . El Niño is like the engine of a car: Fire it up and the atmosphere gets moving . NOAA gives this year’s El Niño a 63 percent chance of exceeding the 3.6-degree F threshold, which would qualify it as a ‘super El Niño’ Climate models are bullish that it could surpass that threshold by a wide margin .

news.title: Mexican World Cup Stadiums have FIFA’s Environmental Certifications
news.description: FIFA maintained the requirement that the venues must have LEED environmental certifications . FIFA also requires that they use natural grass, which is water-intensive to maintain . The BBVA stadium in Monterrey and the Akron stadium in Guadalajara, having been built in the last 15 years, were conceived under more modern parameters and already met some requirements . For a stadium like Azteca in Mexico City, which opened in 1966, this involved major transformations .

news.title: Google just redesigned the search box
news.description: Google announced a sweeping redesign of its search box at its annual I/O developer conference . The new search box expands, accepts files, and coaches you on what to ask . Google is merging AI overviews and AI Mode features into a single, seamless search flow . The changes show a fundamental shift in how Google expects people to interact with the product that generates the vast majority of Alphabet's revenue . It is the clearest signal yet that Google views the future of its flagship product as an interface where users hold open-ended, multimodal conversations with an AI system...
